calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipts For The Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Jul-29-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Receipts For The Blocked Accounts
Off Calendar Jul-01-2024 Continued To Jul-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kale Heiman appeared by zoom for Kirkwood Land (petitioner).

Mrs. Heiman stated that the Guardian Ad Litem supports this direction and that she has waived the requirement of an accounting as well. The court noted that the amount of the minor's share is just over the FDIC limit and advised Mrs. Heiman that they will need to open two blocked accounts at two financial institutions to ensure that the entire amount is insured/protected. The Verified Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition. Status on filing of the receipts for the blocked accounts is set for July 1, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Heiman is to communicate with the probate examiner as to how to provide a second MC-355 (Order to Deposit Funds in Blocked Account) for the second bank account.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
